title: Employees schema
description: A schema for retrieval of employees.

collection.description: The array containing all the employees on the agreement.

employeeNumber.description: The employee number is a unique numerical identifier with a maximum of 9 digits.

employeeGroup.description: The group to which the employee belongs.

employeeGroupNumber.description: The unique identifier of the employee group.

self.description: A unique link reference to the employee group item.

customers.description: A link to the collection of customers which has the employee as a reference.

draftInvoices.description: A link to the collection of draft invoices which has the employee as a reference.

bookedInvoices.description: A link to the collection of booked invoices which has the employee as a reference.

email.description: The email address of the employee

phone.description: The phone number of the employee

barred.description: Shows if the employee is barred from being used.

self.description: A unique link reference to the employee item.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: The unique self reference of the employees collection.
